creator: girgen@FreeBSD.org
text:
A long shot, but it could be related to https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=209599

Any way, we see a similar pattern, not as often as you, but still once a day on fairly busy servers. I'm going to apply the patch from 209599 to see if it helps.

we see
